title: The Horde Helper
body:
This is the first version of my mod; the Horde Helper. It adds the redstone sword, which has high attack damage, 10, and fast attack speed. It can be enchanted with anything a normal sword can with one added feature: life steal enchantment. As of right now, the redstone sword is the only sword that can recieve the life steal enchantment. The levels are as follows:

Level 1: heals 0.5 of a heart each time the player attacks

Level 2: heals 2.5 hearts each attack.

level 3: heals 3.5 hearts each attack.
